messages.speaker: S
messages.text: hey! good morning. how did u sleep

messages.speaker: V
messages.text: lol terrible, neighbors dog was barking til like 2am

messages.speaker: S
messages.text: ughhh i hate when that happens. maybe coffee at the place i mentioned saturday? the one near the park

messages.speaker: V
messages.text: yes! the one with the weird mural?

messages.speaker: V
messages.text: ok cool. btw did you see the game last night

messages.text: no i missed it! who won

messages.text: noooo. ok i need to know your team allegiances before saturday this is important info
